author: Daynette
body: Are you going to put Someday at Christmas on an album? My husband is currently in Iraq. This will be our 2nd Christmas in a row apart. Last year at Christmas he was in Afghanistan….this song hits really close to home. I love your version the best.

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Daynette,  
From what I understand, Jack’s only released this song on his site, and it probably won’t be making an appearance on a formal album per se. That said, you never know with him…
